main.name: Satendra Kumar
main.description: Senior Software Engineer with 4.5+ years of experience specializing in enterprise SaaS architecture, high-performance BI tools, and complex multi-tenant platforms across FinTech, HealthTech, and HR Tech.
main.bio: I am a Senior Software Engineer focused on architecting and scaling complex data-driven applications. With a proven track record of building production-grade HRMS, POS, and Hospital Management systems from scratch, I specialize in multi-tenant architectures, real-time communications, and extreme performance optimizations—like reducing BI report latency by 96%.

seo.title: Satendra Kumar | Senior Full-Stack Engineer & System Architect
seo.description: Portfolio of Satendra Kumar, a Senior Software Engineer specializing in Python/Flask, React.js, and high-performance distributed systems. Expert in BI platforms, Algorithmic Trading, and Enterprise SaaS.
seo.keywords: Senior Software Engineer, Full-Stack Developer, Python Flask Expert, React.js Developer, System Architect, Algorithmic Trading Systems, Enterprise BI, Bengaluru Developer

education.school: Impact College of Engineering and Applied Sciences (ICEAS)

work.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
work.description: Leading architectural design and full-stack development for enterprise-grade BI, Fintech, and ERP solutions.

projects.name: Enterprise BI & Analytics Platform
highlights: Architected scalable backend analytics services using Python (Flask) and PostgreSQL, integrated with Apache Superset.
Drove performance initiatives reducing data processing latency by 96% (40 mins to 90 secs) for financial recalculation pipelines.
Engineered complex React.js visualization modules including pivot reporting and interactive Gantt charts.

projects.name: Automated Options Trading Engine
highlights: Owned end-to-end system design for production-grade algorithmic trading leveraging Flask, Celery, and Redis.
Engineered high-frequency WebSocket microservices for real-time market tick ingestion.
Designed robust order workflows with distributed stop-loss monitoring to eliminate execution slippage.

projects.name: ERP Warehouse Mobile Suite
highlights: Spearheaded React Native warehouse applications with barcode-driven workflows and Epicor ERP integration.
Facilitated real-time synchronization of inventory count cycles and PO receipts via RESTful APIs.
Improved data accuracy and stock tracking efficiency across distributed warehouse environments.

projects.name: DevOps & Infrastructure
highlights: Orchestrated multi-tenant AWS deployments (EC2, S3, Nginx) ensuring 99.9% availability.
Provisioned production-grade instances with hardened security and automated SSL/TLS termination.

work.title: Senior Technical Support Engineer (Network/Security)
work.description: Technical leadership in enterprise network infrastructure and security operations.
highlights: Managed and optimized critical data and voice circuits for Fortune 500 enterprise clients.
Provisioned and troubleshot complex network security protocols and enterprise-grade connectivity.
Ensured 99.9% uptime for business-critical voice circuits through proactive monitoring and rapid incident response.
Collaborated with global engineering teams to resolve tier-3 technical escalations.

projects.title: Enterprise BI & Analytics Platform
projects.description: A high-performance BI suite architected for real-time reporting and complex data visualizations.
features: 96% Latency Reduction: Optimized financial recalculation pipelines from 40 minutes to under 90 seconds.
Custom Visualization: Engineered pivot reporting, interactive Gantt charts, and spreadsheet-style modules in React.
Seamless Integration: Built Python/Flask backend services integrated with Apache Superset for enterprise workflows.

projects.title: Automated Options Trading Engine
projects.description: Production-grade algorithmic trading platform handling high-frequency market data and automated execution.
features: Real-time Tick Ingestion: High-frequency WebSocket microservices for low-latency market data streaming.
Reliable Task Execution: Leveraged Celery and Redis for distributed risk management and multi-leg order workflows.
Automated Risk Control: Integrated stop-loss monitoring to eliminate slippage during high market volatility.

projects.title: ERP Warehouse Mobile Suite
projects.description: Modern logistics solution streamlining warehouse operations with real-time ERP synchronization.
features: ERP Integration: Direct synchronization with Epicor ERP RESTful APIs for inventory and PO management.
Barcode Workflows: Optimized device-driven scanning workflows for high-accuracy stock tracking.
Cross-Platform Efficiency: Built with React Native and Expo to modernize supply chain logistics.

projects.title: Modern HRMS Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade multi-tenant HRMS with India payroll compliance and LMS.
features: Payroll Compliance: Automated Indian statutory compliance and payroll processing.
LMS & Video: Integrated Learning Management System with automated video transcoding.
Real-time Attendance: Geofencing-powered mobile attendance tracking.

projects.title: SmartBill (Finansync)
projects.description: Comprehensive GST billing and inventory ecosystem for Indian SMEs.
features: Omni-channel: Unified experience across Web, Mobile (Expo), and Desktop (Electron).
GST Compliance: Automated tax calculation and invoicing for Indian businesses.
Inventory Management: Real-time stock tracking with automated reorder alerts.
